meaning: Master of Fine Arts 美术硕士
examples: So you narrow your focus, and get your MFA, MBA or just a Master in something else.
I was in an MFA program at the time, so I had other classes, and I did little work over the breaks.
Dean Young (1955 -) was born in Columbia, Pennsylvania, and received his MFA from Indiana University.
Now Amazon is a proponent of the MFA to remove any advantage from its competitors.
To be clear, the MFA does not create a new tax or raise taxes.
